source.extractionMethod: Figma MCP — 7-cell sample walk + pattern extrapolation

spec.name: BUNDLE_SPEC.md
patches: SP-1 exposedProps whenVariant/whenSize filters (exercised on slots[fileButton] + slots[filename])
SP-3 textDecoration captured independent of typography token (not used by Input)
SP-4 $bindingStatus per bindable property (hardcoded fires on container width 373px)
SP-4 extension (v0.3.0): $bindingStatus gains semantically-mismatched (not observed in Input)
SP-6 codeConnect.quality.verificationFailures populated by F12 doc-URL fragment mismatch
SP-7 clipsContent always emitted + bindings.size all 7 fields mandatory
SP-8 nested-INSTANCE tokens (not applicable — Input has no nested INSTANCEs)
SP-9 (v0.3.0): motionReduce on animations — N/A for Input (no animation); spec correctly doesn't force

counts.$comment: Input is the highest cell-coverage atom in the PoC (20% vs Button 1.1% vs Switch 4.7%) because the matrix is smaller. No animations declared. No icons used.

$modesNote: Apollo v2 source page has Light + Dark preview frames adjacent to the component-set — first dark-mode extraction opportunity in the atom batch. Deferred.

smokeTests.name: Step 3 sample cell walks
smokeTests.result: Patterns confirmed across both axes. Filled state = text-color shift only (medium-weight guess corrected). Password variant visually identical to Default (semantic-only). File variant has 2 children with font-weight delta.

auditFindings.$comment: Input adds 2 new findings to the atom-batch ledger. Carries the F8 + F11 pattern across atoms.

F8.carry: Disabled opacity-50 — consistent within atoms (Switch + Input), inconsistent with Button

F11.carry: Invalid state shows destructive ring AT REST — pattern reconfirmed across Switch + Input

F12.summary: 13 of 15 Input cells have wrong '#with-label' documentationLink fragment. Should be '#input' (or base URL). Parallel to Button.Link F3 (#ghost → #link).

F13.summary: Input Invalid container-fill emits as CSS linear-gradient with identical stops — Figma export oddity OR intentional placeholder for future visual treatment.

knownGaps.description: 12 of 15 cells not yet emitted as full node trees
Dark mode untouched; Apollo v2 page has dark preview frame
Password variant has no eye/show-toggle affordance
